source_project: ehemehe-fixed.zip (continued through the previously returned cache/SPA-fixed baseline)
issue: Category-specific fields such as vehicle Model and Mileage were missing from the Details step before Photos.
root_causes: The category fields were not rendered by the React Post Ad component. They were injected later by post-ad-category-fields.js.

Category and subcategory values were copied only from a deferred setTimeout change handler. React could advance from the Category step and unmount those selects before the deferred read completed, leaving the helper state empty.
injectDetailsFields silently returned whenever either stored selection value was empty, so the entire Category Details section disappeared for every category.
The injected section was mounted directly inside a React-owned step container without a stable React-rendered host, making it vulnerable to removal during controlled-input re-renders.
Earlier tests checked schema definitions but did not test the real Category-to-Details DOM transition, so this integration failure was not detected.

A second legacy standalone Post Ad implementation (post-ad.html/post-ad.js) competed with the React five-step /post flow, and brand-theme.js rewrote /post links to that older route, allowing users to reach different forms depending on navigation path.

The project had a prior Supabase taxonomy compatibility risk: category/subcategory select values can be UUIDs while the detail schema uses slugs. The expanded implementation initially needed the earlier visible-option-name normalization restored so UUID-backed selections could still resolve the correct schema.
fixes: Added stable data markers to the native React Category and Subcategory selects and Post Ad steps.
Added a React-owned ehm-category-fields-host in the Details step.
Category and subcategory are now saved synchronously in the capture phase before React unmounts the Category step.
Added a small session/local storage selection snapshot and bounded transition retries; no permanent polling loop was added.
The Details renderer reloads the saved selection before deciding whether a category schema is available.
Reworked the category matrix so all 13 main categories and all 62 current subcategories receive relevant fields instead of unrelated generic fields where possible.
Publishing still reads the same v4 form state and submits category details as custom_fields, preserving the existing Supabase flow.
Made the React five-step /post route the single canonical Post Ad flow.
Removed the /post to /post-ad link rewrite, normalized old /post-ad links to /post, and added a 308 compatibility redirect for /post-ad and /post-ad.html while preserving query parameters.
Updated admin Post Ad quick links to open /post directly; the legacy files remain in the package only as inactive historical fallback files.
Restored and extended category/subcategory alias normalization, including UUID-backed select fallback to the selected option name, while preferring current React slug IDs when available.
production_test_note: No real Vercel deployment, Text.lk OTP, Supabase production insert, or live ad publish was performed from this environment.

validation.category_to_details_browser_dom_race_tes: passed (Cars rendered 11 fields including Model and Mileage)
validation.category_to_details_uuid_browser_dom_tes: passed (UUID option values resolved to Vehicles/Cars and rendered Model/Mileage)
